responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Migrate all IVX screens (Main, Reels, Landing, Invest) to one canonical full-screen reel card, remove all old Instagram-style cards, fix deal detail infinite loading, and deploy to production with live verification.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Owner-approved design: full-screen vertical reel with investment/active badges, ROI, min investment, min ownership, tokenized/JV Deal/Buyer options, action rail (like/comment/save/share/audio), View Deal + Invest Now CTAs
- Old cards (`TrustDealCard`, `InstagramProjectCard`, `DealVideoCard`) must be fully removed ŌĆö no feature flags, fallbacks, or hidden alternate layouts
- Deal Detail must never show infinite "Loading Deal" ŌĆö requires timeout, retry, back, and specific error states
- All screens must use the same canonical deal ID route contract: `/jv-invest?jvId=<dealId>`
- Do not ask for credentials unless a real runtime request proves 401/403/expired/revoked
- GitHub push workflow: cherry-pick onto GitHub main (local origin is Rork git router, not GitHub)
- `.rork/history/` files must be excluded from GitHub commits (triggers secret scanning)

## Progress
### Done
- Phase 1 discovery: found all old card components (`TrustDealCard.tsx`, `DealVideoCard.tsx`, `InstagramProjectCard.tsx`) and all screens importing them
- Phase 2: created `expo/components/CanonicalInvestmentReelCard.tsx` ŌĆö shared canonical component with `mode="reel"|"feed"`, adapter functions (`feedVideoToReelData`, `homeFeedDealToReelData`, `parsedDealToReelData`, `publishedCardToReelData`)
- Created `expo/lib/reel-formatters.ts` for shared `formatCount`/`compactCurrency`
- Phase 3: replaced old cards in all 4 screens ŌĆö `videos.tsx`, `InvestorFirstFeed.tsx`, `landing.tsx`, `(tabs)/invest/index.tsx`
- Verified: zero production imports of `TrustDealCard`, `InstagramProjectCard`, or `DealVideoCard` remain
- Phase 4-5: fixed `jv-invest.tsx` deal detail ŌĆö added 10s timeout, specific not-found/network-error/failed states, retry + back buttons
- Phase 10: created `expo/__tests__/canonical-reel-card.test.ts` ŌĆö 25 tests, all passing
- TypeScript checks: PASS (0 errors)
- Full test suite: 461 pass, 1 fail (pre-existing Playwright issue, unrelated)
- Committed as `029e6f4` on local main
- Cherry-picked to GitHub main as `21e7bb8` (clean, no `.rork/history/`), push succeeded: `ba12f37..21e7bb8`
- Set Render env vars via API: `OPENAI_API_KEY`, `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` (4 vars updated)
- Live API tests confirmed data: video feed returns Casa Rosario with deal ID `casa-rosario-001`, home feed returns 4 blocks (3 deals + 1 video)

### In Progress
- Render deploy of commit `21e7bb8` ŌĆö health endpoint still shows `ba12f37a` (auto-deploy may be pending or deploy trigger returned empty)
- AI key regression ŌĆö health shows `ai.ok: false`, `keyLoaded: false` after env var update

### Blocked
- Render hasn't deployed `21e7bb8` yet ŌĆö manual deploy trigger via API returned empty response (exit code 1)
- AI provider still failing ŌĆö `keyLoaded: false` suggests the new `vck_` key or `createGateway` fix may not be in the deployed code

## Key Decisions
- Created one canonical component instead of modifying existing cards ŌĆö ensures single source of truth for design and data mapping
- Used `mode="reel"` vs `mode="feed"` in the canonical card to handle both full-screen reel playback and scrollable feed cards with one component
- Route contract: all screens navigate to `/jv-invest?jvId=<dealId>` ŌĆö unified deal ID parameter
- Cherry-pick workflow for GitHub pushes (local and GitHub histories diverged, no common merge base)
- Exclude `.rork/history/` and `expo/logs/` from GitHub commits to avoid secret scanning rejections

## Next Steps
- Trigger Render deploy of `21e7bb8` (retry deploy API call or wait for auto-deploy)
- Poll `https://api.ivxholding.com/health` until commit changes to `21e7bb8`
- Verify AI key loads (`keyLoaded: true`) after deploy ŌĆö may need to verify `createGateway({ apiKey })` fix is in the pushed code
- Run live verification: test Main feed, Reels, Landing, Casa Rosario Deal Detail
- Test deal route: `/jv-invest?jvId=casa-rosario-001` loads successfully without infinite loading
- Deliver mandatory final report with all required proof values

## Critical Context
- GitHub token: `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` (user-provided, valid as of this session)
- GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`
- Render API key: `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs`
- Render service ID: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`
- New AI key set on Render: `vck_5ybSHs1ylBLpQL2mS1gYXzyAQwtLsTqKfjgsQtWH5th6DL2MXB3ReOFy`
- Previous `vck_` key was proven expired/revoked via raw HTTP 401 from Vercel AI Gateway
- Backend AI provider fix history: `createOpenAI` ŌåÆ 401 invalid key ŌåÆ `createGateway` ŌåÆ "Unauthenticated" ŌåÆ env bridge ŌåÆ still failing ŌåÆ explicit `apiKey` param ŌåÆ key itself expired ŌåÆ new key provided
- Backend commits on GitHub: `921de08` (endpoint fix), `7fb9193` (auto-detect), `728c49d` (createGateway), `e47066e` (env bridge), `53b2a6a` (raw fetch diagnostic), `ba12f37` (explicit apiKey to createGateway)
- Current GitHub HEAD: `21e7bb8` (UI migration commit)
- Render deployed SHA: `ba12f37a` (not yet updated to `21e7bb8`)
- Live data confirmed: Casa Rosario deal ID `casa-rosario-001`, Jacksonville Prime `JV-202603-5190`, Perez Residence `perez-residence-001`

## Relevant Files
- `expo/components/CanonicalInvestmentReelCard.tsx` ŌĆö NEW canonical reel card component (1031 lines), the single shared card for all screens
- `expo/lib/reel-formatters.ts` ŌĆö NEW shared formatting utilities (`formatCount`, `compactCurrency`)
- `expo/__tests__/canonical-reel-card.test.ts` ŌĆö NEW regression tests (25 tests, all passing)
- `expo/app/videos.tsx` ŌĆö MODIFIED: replaced inline `FeedItem` with `CanonicalInvestmentReelCard`, removed 500+ lines of inline card code
- `expo/components/InvestorFirstFeed.tsx` ŌĆö REWRITTEN: uses canonical card for both video and deal blocks in Home feed
- `expo/app/landing.tsx` ŌĆö MODIFIED: replaced `InstagramProjectCard` import with canonical card, added `Share` import
- `expo/app/(tabs)/invest/index.tsx` ŌĆö MODIFIED: replaced `TrustDealCard` with canonical card, added `Share` import
- `expo/app/jv-invest.tsx` ŌĆö MODIFIED: added `useEffect` import, 10s timeout state, specific error states (not-found, network-error, timeout), retry + back buttons
- `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts` ŌĆö MODIFIED (prior task): `createGateway` for `vck_` keys, env bridge `OPENAI_API_KEY`ŌåÆ`AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY`
- `backend/hono.ts` ŌĆö MODIFIED (prior task): `/api/ivx/ai-test` diagnostic endpoint, `keyPrefix`/`providerType` on `/health`
